title: Risk Policy — Capital Preservation
text: Capital preservation first. Every trade requires a stop loss. No position without defined invalidation. Risk per trade must stay within organization limits. Revenge trading and emotional sizing are forbidden.

title: Trading Playbook — Approval Gate
text: Human approval is required before any executable order. The agent must not bypass approval or risk checks. Paper mode is the default. Real trading remains disabled unless operators explicitly change deployment safety settings.

title: HTF Trend Pullback Template
text: Pullback entry rules: trade only with higher timeframe trend alignment. Wait for pullback into value. Confirm invalidation before sizing. Prefer BTC and major pairs with liquid books.

title: Mistakes Database — FOMO
text: Common mistake: chasing green candles due to FOMO. Apply green day guard before adding risk. After a loss, enforce cooldown before the next setup.
